regions.text: Men have been attempting for thousands of years to make wings that will let them fly like the birds.
Here is the picture of the first flying machine to take men into the sky, made in 1903. It did not fly very fast or very far.
Now planes can fly farther and faster than the fastest bird and can carry heavy weights through the air. Man can go faster than sound in the newest planes.
heavy: of great weight. fast: quickly. fly: go through the air. FUTURE: will fly. PRESENT: fly(ies). PAST: flew, flown.
